title: executor: global index has correct problem when insert
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ```SQL use test; CREATE TABLE tbl_51 ( col_334 mediumint(9) NOT NULL DEFAULT '-3217641', col_335 mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2002468', col_336 enum('alice','bob','charlie','david') COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'alice', PRIMARY KEY (col_334,col_336,col_335) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */, UNIQUE KEY idx_116 (col_334,col_335), UNIQUE KEY idx_117 (col_336,col_334), UNIQUE KEY idx_118 (col_336) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci PARTITION BY HASH( col_334 ) PARTITIONS 6; insert into tbl_51 values(-3112969,3273861,'charlie'),(-3040776,4159759,'charlie'); ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) duplicate key error ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) mysql> select tidb_version(); +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | tidb_version() | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | Release Version: v7.6.0-alpha-629-g89fc4403f3-dirty Edition: Community Git Commit Hash: 89fc4403f3a05d59a6793bf1965dc2281e3fb29f Git Branch: local/fix_global_index_under_clustered_index UTC Build Time: 2024-01-03 03:27:27 GoVersion: go1.21.0 Race Enabled: false Check Table Before Drop: false Store: unistore | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_52 (col_a Int32 NOT NULL, col_b String NOT NULL, col_c Date NOT NULL, UNIQUE INDEX idx_a_b (col_a, col_b), PRIMARY KEY (col_a, col_c)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (col_a, col_c);
CREATE TABLE tbl_53 (col_x Int64 NOT NULL, col_y Float32 NOT NULL, col_z DateTime DEFAULT now(), UNIQUE INDEX idx_x_y (col_x, col_y)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col_x;
key_bug_features: insert into partitioned table with unique constraints
